page_metadata.biotools__summary: LigBind is a relation-aware framework with graph-level pre-training to enhance the ligand-specific binding residue predictions for 1159 ligands, which can effectively cover the ligands with a few known binding proteins.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: LigBind is a relation-aware framework with graph-level pre-training to enhance the ligand-specific binding residue predictions for 1159 ligands, which can effectively cover the ligands with a few known binding proteins.
